{{R|Sand Castle||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relic}}. Upon pickup, 6 random cards are {{2|Upgrade|Upgraded}}.

== Obtaining Sand Castle==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 2|Act 2}}, can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Sand Castle''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Electric Shrymp||2}}, {{R|Glass Eye||2}}, {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}}, and {{R|Sea Glass||2}}, only 1 of the 5 can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
